title: Connected Speech Practice

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Listen to the clear sentence first. Then hear natural American speech two times.
dialogue.chinese: 先听清晰完整的句子，再听两遍自然美式口语。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Part one. Four easy examples.
dialogue.chinese: 第一部分：四个入门例子。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: Because I love you.  Natural: Because I love you.
dialogue.chinese: 因为我爱你。because 的非重读音节会弱化。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: You can do it.  Natural: You can do it.
dialogue.chinese: 你能做到。肯定句中的 can 常弱读为 /kən/。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: What did he say?  Natural: What did he say?
dialogue.chinese: 他说了什么？did he 连读时，he 的 h 可能弱化。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: What are you doing?  Natural: Whaddaya doing?
dialogue.chinese: 你在做什么？what are you 会连续弱读和连读。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Part two. Weak sounds.
dialogue.chinese: 第二部分：高频弱读。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: I want to go.  Natural: I wanna go.
dialogue.chinese: 我想走。to 在非重读位置常弱读，want to 常连成 wanna。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: This is for you.  Natural: This is fer ya.
dialogue.chinese: 这是给你的。for 和 you 都会弱读。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: You and me.  Natural: You 'n me.
dialogue.chinese: 你和我。and 常弱读到只剩 /n/。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: A cup of tea.  Natural: A cup uh tea.
dialogue.chinese: 一杯茶。of 常弱读为 /əv/，有时更接近 /ə/。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: I can do it.  Natural: I c'n do it.
dialogue.chinese: 我能做到。肯定句中的 can 通常不重读。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: Do you know?  Natural: D'ya know?
dialogue.chinese: 你知道吗？you 常弱读为 /jə/。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: Tell him to come.  Natural: Tell 'im ta come.
dialogue.chinese: 叫他来。him 的 h 可能省略，to 同时弱读。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: Give her a call.  Natural: Give 'er a call.
dialogue.chinese: 给她打个电话。her 的 h 可能省略。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Part three. Linking and sound changes.
dialogue.chinese: 第三部分：连读、同化与省音。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: Did you see it?  Natural: Didja see it?
dialogue.chinese: 你看见了吗？did you 常听起来像 didja。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: Would you help me?  Natural: Wouldja help me?
dialogue.chinese: 你愿意帮我吗？would you 常发生同化。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: Could you open it?  Natural: Couldja open it?
dialogue.chinese: 你能打开它吗？could you 常发生同化。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: Don't you know?  Natural: Dontcha know?
dialogue.chinese: 你不知道吗？don't you 常听起来像 dontcha。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: Can't you see?  Natural: Cantcha see?
dialogue.chinese: 你看不见吗？can't you 常听起来像 cantcha。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: What do you want?  Natural: Whaddaya want?
dialogue.chinese: 你想要什么？what do you 会连续弱读和连读。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: What are you doing?  Natural: Whaddaya doing?
dialogue.chinese: 你在做什么？are 和 you 都会弱读并连在一起。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: Does he know?  Natural: Does 'e know?
dialogue.chinese: 他知道吗？does he 连读时 h 可能弱化。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: Is he coming?  Natural: Is 'e coming?
dialogue.chinese: 他来吗？is he 连读时 h 可能弱化。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: Tell him the truth.  Natural: Tell 'im the truth.
dialogue.chinese: 告诉他真相。tell him 连读时 him 的 h 可能省略。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Part four. Common short forms.
dialogue.chinese: 第四部分：常见固定缩读。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: I'm going to leave.  Natural: I'm gonna leave.
dialogue.chinese: 我要走了。going to 常缩读为 gonna。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: Do you want to go?  Natural: D'ya wanna go?
dialogue.chinese: 你想去吗？want to 常缩读为 wanna。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: I've got to go.  Natural: I gotta go.
dialogue.chinese: 我得走了。got to 常缩读为 gotta。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: I have to work.  Natural: I hafta work.
dialogue.chinese: 我必须工作。have to 常听起来像 hafta。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: She has to leave.  Natural: She has ta leave.
dialogue.chinese: 她必须离开。has to 在自然口语中会弱化。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: Let me see.  Natural: Lemme see.
dialogue.chinese: 让我看看。let me 常缩读为 lemme。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: Give me a minute.  Natural: Gimme a minute.
dialogue.chinese: 给我一分钟。give me 常缩读为 gimme。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: It's kind of strange.  Natural: It's kinda strange.
dialogue.chinese: 这有点奇怪。kind of 常缩读为 kinda。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: We're out of time.  Natural: We're outta time.
dialogue.chinese: 我们没时间了。out of 常缩读为 outta。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: I have a lot of work.  Natural: I have a lotta work.
dialogue.chinese: 我有很多工作。a lot of 常连成 a lotta。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: You should have called.  Natural: You shoulda called.
dialogue.chinese: 你本应该打电话。should have 常缩读为 shoulda。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: I could have helped.  Natural: I coulda helped.
dialogue.chinese: 我本可以帮忙。could have 常缩读为 coulda。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: I would have stayed.  Natural: I woulda stayed.
dialogue.chinese: 我本来会留下。would have 常缩读为 woulda。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Part five. Full sentence practice.
dialogue.chinese: 第五部分：整句听感训练。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: What do you want to do?  Natural: Whaddaya wanna do?
dialogue.chinese: 你想做什么？

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: Did you tell him about it?  Natural: Didja tell 'im about it?
dialogue.chinese: 你把这件事告诉他了吗？

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: I should have told you.  Natural: I shoulda told ya.
dialogue.chinese: 我本应该告诉你。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: Do you want to go with me?  Natural: D'ya wanna go with me?
dialogue.chinese: 你想和我一起去吗？

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Clear: What are you doing?  Natural: Whaddaya doing?
dialogue.chinese: 你在做什么？

source_title: 英语听力中的连读、弱读与缩读
